testcase.name: test_create_course_with_self_paced

failure.message:
AssertionError: POST response returned course_type=scheduled (expected self_paced) assert 'scheduled' == 'self_paced'
- self_paced + scheduled

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_course_type.py:68: in test_create_course_with_self_paced assert created.get("course_type") == "self_paced", \ E AssertionError: POST response returned course_type=scheduled (expected self_paced) E assert 'scheduled' == 'self_paced' E E - self_paced E + scheduled

testcase.name: test_create_course_with_hybrid

failure.message:
AssertionError: hybrid not persisted: got scheduled assert 'scheduled' == 'hybrid'
- hybrid + scheduled

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_course_type.py:98: in test_create_course_with_hybrid assert g.json().get("course_type") == "hybrid", \ E AssertionError: hybrid not persisted: got scheduled E assert 'scheduled' == 'hybrid' E E - hybrid E + scheduled

testcase.name: test_update_course_type

failure.message:
AssertionError: update didn't persist: scheduled assert 'scheduled' == 'self_paced'
- self_paced + scheduled

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_course_type.py:112: in test_update_course_type assert g.json().get("course_type") == "self_paced", \ E AssertionError: update didn't persist: scheduled E assert 'scheduled' == 'self_paced' E E - self_paced E + scheduled
